headline: Waste Management (WM) Is Up 6.0% After Hiking Dividend Despite Earnings Miss - What’s Changed
summary: Waste Management recently declared a higher quarterly cash dividend of US$0.945 per share, payable on March 27, 2026, to shareholders of record on March 13, 2026. This sizeable dividend increase, announced alongside a quarter that fell short of earnings expectations, highlights management’s emphasis on shareholder returns even as operational performance faces pressure. Next, we’ll examine how WM’s sizeable dividend increase, set against an earnings miss, shapes the company’s broader...
